name: omnighost
description: Publish and update Ghost CMS posts from Obsidian on desktop and iOS — image upload, in-place updates, scheduling and YAML metadata control.
author: Alexy Khrabrov

scripts.test: tsx --test src/versioning/note-version.test.ts src/versioning/publication-provenance.test.ts src/versioning/textpack-source.test.ts src/importers/textpack.test.ts src/ghost/api-client.test.ts src/ghost/url.test.ts
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
